rulings.Case Title: J.R. MARKETING, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al VS. HARTFORD CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 28, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT HARTFORD CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART. PARAGRAPH 25: STRIKE THE PHRASE "DESPITE THIS COURT'S JULY 26, 2006 AND SEPTEMBER 26, 2006 ORDERS REQUIRING APPOINTMENT OF CUMIS COUNSEL. PARAGRAPH 38: STRIKE. STRIKE PRAYER FOR RELIEF IN PARAGRAPH THREE. DENY OTHER REQUESTS. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: J.R. MARKETING, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al VS. HARTFORD CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 28, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT HARTFORD CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE HENRY DECISON APPLIES TO FIDUCIARY DUTY CLAIMS, NOT TO A BREACH OF THE COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALINGS. =(302/PJM/AB)
